name: Down to the Uplight
coreLesson: Dig downward to reach a warm holy draft that lifts skeletons into the escape light.
funBeat: The correct move feels backwards: go down into the crypt so the holy light can pull everyone up.
riskNotes: Use warm colors and upward motes so the draft reads as safe, not a laser hazard.
Make the shaft/draft forgiving enough for a marching crowd.
